title: Ubiquiti GBE-LR, GigaBeam airMAX AC 60 GHz/5 GHz Radio, 1Gbps+, Long Range
description: airMAX AC 60 GHz/5 GHz Radio with 1+ Gbps Throughput and up to 2 km Range. Featuring a high-gain dish antenna, the GigaBeam LR is a 60 GHz radio designed for low-interference and high-throughput connectivity in long-range deployments. It includes a 5 GHz radio for failover. For the 60 GHz link, the GigaBeam LR supports full bandwidth use of 2.16 GHz. The dedicated 2.4GHz management radio allows easy setup via Wi-Fi 60 GHz radio with 5 GHz radio backup Low-interference 60 GHz spectrum Up to 1+ Gbps with low latency Long-range performance 2.4 GHz management radio Full bandwidth support: 2.16 GHz Device Pole mount Gigabit PoE adapter 24V / 0,5A Power cable
